mapper.select:
SELECT count(1) totalCount, if(ROUND(sum(s.total_amount)/10000,2) is null,0,ROUND(sum(s.total_amount)/10000,2)) totalAmount, if(ROUND(sum(s.breach_amount-s.receive_breach_amount),2) is null,0,ROUND(sum(s.breach_amount-s.receive_breach_amount),2)) totalBreachAmount, if(ROUND(sum(s.total_number),3) is null,0,ROUND(sum(s.total_number),3)) totalNumber, 'F' statisticsType FROM t_ctr_contract b INNER JOIN t_ctr_contract_rela r ON r.buy_contract_id=b.id INNER JOIN t_ctr_contract s ON r.sell_contract_id=s.id
WHERE s.contract_status != 'C' and s.contract_type='S' and s.enterprise_id = 44 and b.dealed_amount >= b.total_amount and s.total_number > s.warehouse_number
and s.match_user_id not in
#{hgMatchUserIdList[${index}]}

SELECT count(1) totalCount, if(ROUND(SUM(s.total_amount - s.dealed_amount)/10000,2) is null,0,ROUND(SUM(s.total_amount - s.dealed_amount)/10000,2)) totalAmount, #{startDate} payFullTime FROM t_ctr_contract s WHERE s.contract_status != 'C' and s.contract_type='S' and s.business_type='ZY-BB' and s.enterprise_id = 44 and s.warehouse_number >= s.total_number and s.total_amount > s.dealed_amount and s.pay_full_time BETWEEN #{startDate} and #{endDate}

SELECT count(1) totalCount, if(ROUND(SUM(s.total_amount - s.dealed_amount)/10000,2) is null,0,ROUND(SUM(s.total_amount - s.dealed_amount)/10000,2)) totalAmount, 'B' statisticsType, '已发货未到还款日' statisticsTypeName FROM t_ctr_contract_settlement t LEFT JOIN t_ctr_contract s ON t.sell_contract_id = s.id LEFT JOIN t_ctr_contract b ON t.buy_contract_id = b.id WHERE s.`status` != 'C' and s.contract_status != 'C' and s.enterprise_id = 44 and s.business_type='ZY-BB' and s.match_credit_flg=true and s.seal_flg=TRUE and b.seal_flg=TRUE AND b.dealed_amount >= b.total_amount AND s.total_amount > s.dealed_amount
AND s.warehouse_number >= s.total_number AND s.appoint_pay_full_time >= NOW()

SELECT count(1) totalCount, if(ROUND(SUM(s.total_amount - s.dealed_amount)/10000,2) is null,0,ROUND(SUM(s.total_amount - s.dealed_amount)/10000,2)) totalAmount, 'C' statisticsType, '已发货已过还款日' statisticsTypeName FROM t_ctr_contract_settlement t LEFT JOIN t_ctr_contract s ON t.sell_contract_id = s.id LEFT JOIN t_ctr_contract b ON t.buy_contract_id = b.id WHERE s.`status` != 'C' and s.contract_status != 'C' and s.enterprise_id = 44 and s.business_type='ZY-BB' and s.match_credit_flg=true and s.seal_flg=TRUE and b.seal_flg=TRUE AND b.dealed_amount >= b.total_amount AND s.total_amount > s.dealed_amount
AND s.warehouse_number >= s.total_number AND NOW() > s.appoint_pay_full_time

SELECT count(1) totalCount, if(ROUND(SUM(s.total_amount - s.dealed_amount)/10000,2) is null,0,ROUND(SUM(s.total_amount - s.dealed_amount)/10000,2)) totalAmount, 'D' statisticsType, '未发货未过还款日' statisticsTypeName FROM t_ctr_contract_settlement t LEFT JOIN t_ctr_contract s ON t.sell_contract_id = s.id LEFT JOIN t_ctr_contract b ON t.buy_contract_id = b.id WHERE s.`status` != 'C' and s.contract_status != 'C' and s.enterprise_id = 44 and s.business_type='ZY-BB' and s.match_credit_flg=true and s.seal_flg=TRUE and b.seal_flg=TRUE AND b.dealed_amount >= b.total_amount AND s.total_amount > s.dealed_amount
AND s.total_number > s.warehouse_number AND s.appoint_pay_full_time >= NOW()

SELECT count(1) totalCount, if(ROUND(SUM(s.total_amount - s.dealed_amount)/10000,2) is null,0,ROUND(SUM(s.total_amount - s.dealed_amount)/10000,2)) totalAmount, 'E' statisticsType, '未发货已过还款日' statisticsTypeName FROM t_ctr_contract_settlement t LEFT JOIN t_ctr_contract s ON t.sell_contract_id = s.id LEFT JOIN t_ctr_contract b ON t.buy_contract_id = b.id WHERE s.`status` != 'C' and s.contract_status != 'C' and s.enterprise_id = 44 and s.business_type='ZY-BB' and s.match_credit_flg=true and s.seal_flg=TRUE and b.seal_flg=TRUE AND b.dealed_amount >= b.total_amount AND s.total_amount > s.dealed_amount
AND s.total_number > s.warehouse_number AND NOW() > s.appoint_pay_full_time

SELECT count(1) totalCount, if(ROUND(SUM(s.total_amount - s.dealed_amount)/10000,2) is null,0,ROUND(SUM(s.total_amount - s.dealed_amount)/10000,2)) totalAmount, 'Sum' statisticsType, '合计' statisticsTypeName FROM t_ctr_contract_settlement t LEFT JOIN t_ctr_contract s ON t.sell_contract_id = s.id LEFT JOIN t_ctr_contract b ON t.buy_contract_id = b.id WHERE s.`status` != 'C' and s.contract_status != 'C' and s.enterprise_id = 44 and s.business_type='ZY-BB' and s.match_credit_flg=true and s.seal_flg=TRUE and b.seal_flg=TRUE AND b.dealed_amount >= b.total_amount AND s.total_amount > s.dealed_amount

SELECT if(ROUND(SUM(s.total_amount)/10000,2) is null,0,ROUND(SUM(s.total_amount)/10000,2)) totalAmount, s.match_credit_flg matchCreditFlg, WEEK(#{startDate}) week, date_format(#{startDate}, '%Y') year, date_format(#{startDate}, '%Y-%m-%d') startDate FROM t_ctr_contract s WHERE s.contract_status != 'C' and s.contract_type='S' and s.enterprise_id = 44 and s.business_type in ('ZY-BB','ZY-XS') and s.seal_date BETWEEN #{startDate} and #{endDate}

SELECT if(ROUND(SUM(s.total_amount)/10000,2) is null,0,ROUND(SUM(s.total_amount)/10000,2)) totalAmount, s.match_credit_flg matchCreditFlg, #{month} month FROM t_ctr_contract s WHERE s.contract_status != 'C' and s.contract_type='S' and s.enterprise_id = 44 and s.business_type in ('ZY-BB','ZY-XS') and date_format(s.seal_date, '%Y-%m') = #{month}
